mapper.select: SELECT CL.CLASS_SN, CL.CLASS_NM, CL.CLASS_STAT_CD, CL.ENRL_STRT_YMD, CL.ENRL_END_YMD, CO.COURSE_NM, CO.INSTR_USER_ID, M.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM, NVL(SC.STUDENT_CNT, 0) AS STUDENT_CNT, LC.LECTURE_CNT, CASE WHEN NVL(SC.STUDENT_CNT, 0) = 0 OR LC.LECTURE_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( NVL(LP_DONE.DONE_CNT, 0) * 100.0 / (SC.STUDENT_CNT * LC.LECTURE_CNT) , 1) END AS AVG_PROGRESS_RATE FROM CLASSROOM CL INNER JOIN COURSE CO ON CO.COURSE_SN = CL.COURSE_SN INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_ID = CO.INSTR_USER_ID INNER JOIN ( SELECT COURSE_SN, COUNT(*) AS LECTURE_CNT FROM LECTURE GROUP BY COURSE_SN ) LC ON LC.COURSE_SN = CO.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CLASS_SN, COUNT(*) AS STUDENT_CNT FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' GROUP BY CLASS_SN ) SC ON SC.CLASS_SN = CL.CLASS_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT LP.COURSE_SN, CM.CLASS_SN, COUNT(*) AS DONE_CNT FROM LECTURE_PROGRESS LP INNER JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER CM ON CM.USER_ID = LP.USER_ID AND CM.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' WHERE LP.SECONDS_WATCHED > 0 GROUP BY LP.COURSE_SN, CM.CLASS_SN ) LP_DONE ON LP_DONE.COURSE_SN = CO.COURSE_SN AND LP_DONE.CLASS_SN = CL.CLASS_SN ORDER BY CL.CLASS_SN
